problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: Combining Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
